answer.availability_test: Reject the feature if it is only known after the approval decision.
answer.mitigation: remove post_approval_call_count, retrain the model, and audit all features for decision-time availability

evidence: post_approval_call_count is future data because it is created after the approval decision and follow-up process. A model used during approval cannot use facts from after approval. employment_months is a safer comparison because it can be known before the decision.
